provider: 诗画小书童原创诗意插画
policy: All illustrations are original project artwork bundled locally for offline use; assets may be created with built-in ImageGen or local vector drawing.

jiang-nan.title: 江南
jiang-nan.scene: 层层莲叶、粉荷、穿行的小鱼

hua.title: 画
hua.scene: 画轴中的远山、无声流水、常开花朵与安静小鸟

yong-e.title: 咏鹅
yong-e.scene: 曲颈白鹅、绿水、红掌与清波

feng.title: 风

jing-ye-si.title: 静夜思
jing-ye-si.scene: 窗前月光、地上如霜与思乡旅人

jiang-xue.title: 江雪
